race.comment: One of country Victoria's premier sprint races and the traditional feature of Day 1, this year's Topaz is about as tricky as they come. FANCIFY (4) was adequate at the first run for the new stable, beaten 4 lengths in Listed grade at Flemington, and with that under the belt she can improve on her good second-up record. SALSA FELLOW (9) is up sharply in grade here, but launched late to score a thrilling win at Warrnambool and draws better than a number of key players. STEEL MOVE (10) is building a good career record and a stylish Flemington jumpout win hinted at a big first-up showing. PRESS DOWN (8) needs to lift on the Wangoom run, but won this race two years ago and was runner-up last year, so he obviously loves the place and gets blinkers for the first time.
